title: Australia World Cup manager Tony Popovic calls out referee after big loss to Team USA
description: Australia coach Tony Popovic criticized the referee after a 2-0 World Cup loss to the U.S., citing a controversial VAR-reviewed goal in Seattle.

title: New images show murder weapon, fatal injury in Texas high school track meet stabbing of Austin Metcalf
description: Court officials have made public new images detailing the fatal wound and murder weapon that killed student Austin Metcalf during a Texas high school track meet confrontation.

title: Michigan trio allegedly beat, strangled and gagged man at Las Vegas hotel to collect on gambling debts
description: Three Michigan men allegedly kidnapped and beat a man at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas over gambling debts, demanding $185,000 from the victim's father.
